source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
The twelve-sided figure shown has been drawn on $1 \text{ cm}\times 1 \text{ cm}$ graph paper. What is the area of the figure in $\text{cm}^2$?

<image1>

image_dependency: Question text explicitly says 'figure shown' and asks for the area of a drawn 12-sided figure on graph paper
`text_dominant`=false, so the visual asset is central rather than auxiliary
`asset_registry_record.registry_passed`=true and image asset exists with high readability metadata
multi_step: Finding area of an irregular 12-sided figure on graph paper typically requires decomposition, counting unit squares, or geometric subtraction rather than a single lookup
The task combines visual interpretation of the polygon with area computation from the grid
Numeric free-response with no choices suggests solution must be derived, not recognized
Metadata `multi_solution_policy.mode`='aggressive' is supportive but not treated as direct proof, so score remains moderate
verifiability: `answer_type` is numeric and `answer_text`='13', which is easy to compare against a final-value checker
Area on 1 cm x 1 cm graph paper usually permits rule-based or reconstructed verification from the figure
Single numeric target improves automatic checking, though validating the full reasoning still depends on correct image interpretation

decision_reasons: 资产登记完整：题干、答案和主图像均存在，且 `registry_passed`=true、无已登记问题。
综合信号较强：`image_dependency_score`=0.97、`verifiability_score`=0.91，题目具有明确视觉依赖且答案可核验。
虽有 `image_not_directly_inspected` 风险标记，但当前没有证据表明核心语义缺失或不可恢复，不足以降为低优先级。
